prompt: A breathtaking vertical Japanese anime film poster for a fantasy adventure movie, painted in a luminous cinematic style with dramatic sunset lighting, painterly clouds, and highly detailed background scenery. The composition features 4 human figures total: 2 large upper-body character portraits dominating the top half, and 1 small full-body girl in the foreground plus 1 tiny implied city crowd only as environmental scale. The main featured characters are a teenage girl and a teenage boy shown back-to-back in profile near the upper center, both facing opposite directions with calm, wistful, serious expressions. The girl has short windblown dark navy-blue hair with soft highlights, a school uniform-style outfit in deep blue with a white collar and a red ribbon bow, and she is positioned larger on the left. The boy is slightly smaller on the right, with tousled light brown hair, a dark high-collar coat or cloak, and a contemplative look. The lower center shows a younger girl standing on a stone overlook from behind, wearing a dark blue coat or dress, ankle socks, dark shoes, and a long red scarf blowing strongly in the wind; beside her sits 1 black cat, both gazing toward the horizon and the city below. The setting is an expansive fantasy city at golden hour, with warm sunlight breaking across a river valley and rooftops, and a towering ornate spiral-like clocktower or fantastical cathedral spire rising on the right side. In the sky are 6 floating islands of varying sizes covered with grass and rocky undersides, scattered across the upper left and upper right sky. Also include 5 white birds flying across the middle and lower sky, plus 1 large gliding bird-like silhouette on the left midground. Frame the foreground with soft blue and white flowers and foliage along the bottom corners. Use a dreamy palette of violet, lavender, peach, gold, and soft blue, with glowing rim light, atmospheric haze, epic scale, emotional fantasy-adventure mood, and premium hand-painted anime poster finish. Add Japanese movie-poster typography integrated into the image: a large vertical tagline in white on the upper right, a large central title in white kanji reading 星を紡ぐ旅人, smaller subtitle text beneath it, 3 award-laurel callout blocks in white on the upper left, a release date block on the lower left reading 7.18 FRI above ROADSHOW, a short promotional quote in white on the lower right, and a line of film staff credits across the bottom center. Include a small copyright line at the very bottom. Make it feel like an original blockbuster anime movie poster by a prestigious studio, emotionally uplifting, nostalgic, magical, and grand in scale.
